creator: dennylin93@cnmc32.hs.ntnu.edu.tw
text:
Both http://www.freebsd.org/internal/doceng.html and src/share/misc/committers-doc.dot show that Murray Stokely is a doceng@ team member.

However, this commit (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/www/en/             administration.sgml#rev1.28) shows that Murrary stepped down a while ago.

Fix: See patches.
